mapper.sql: organizationid, billingno, customerid, carrierid, billingtype, billmonth, billdatefm, billdateto, status, totalamount, discountstart, discountrate, adjustedamount, adjustnotes, currencytype, currencyrate, totalbillingamount, invoiceamount, invoicestatus, createbranchid, settlementbranchid, tariffid, taxrate, paymentmethod, notes, udf01, udf02, udf03, udf04, udf05, currentversion, oprseqflag, addwho, addtime, editwho, edittime, edisendflag, edierrordescr, ediSendTime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo.T_BIL_BILLING_HEADER_OPS
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo.T_BIL_BILLING_HEADER_OPS
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.T_BIL_BILLING_HEADER_OPS (organizationid, billingno, customerid, carrierid, billingtype, billmonth, billdatefm, billdateto, status, totalamount, discountstart, discountrate, adjustedamount, adjustnotes, currencytype, currencyrate, totalbillingamount, invoiceamount, invoicestatus, createbranchid, settlementbranchid, tariffid, taxrate, paymentmethod, notes, udf01, udf02, udf03, udf04, udf05, currentversion, oprseqflag, addwho, addtime, editwho, edittime, edisendflag, edierrordescr, ediSendTime, notetext) values (#{organizationid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{billingno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{customerid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{carrierid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{billingtype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{billmonth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{billdatefm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{billdateto,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{totalamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountstart,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{adjustedamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{adjustnotes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{currencytype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{currencyrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalbillingamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{invoiceamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{invoicestatus,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createbranchid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{settlementbranchid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{tariffid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paymentmethod,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{udf01,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{udf02,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{udf03,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{udf04,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{udf05,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{currentversion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oprseqflag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{addwho,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{addtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{editwho,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{edittime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{edisendflag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{edierrordescr,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{edisendtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{notetext,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.T_BIL_BILLING_HEADER_OPS
organizationid = #{record.organizationid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
billingno = #{record.billingno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
customerid = #{record.customerid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
carrierid = #{record.carrierid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
billingtype = #{record.billingtype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
billmonth = #{record.billmonth,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
billdatefm = #{record.billdatefm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
billdateto = #{record.billdateto,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
totalamount = #{record.totalamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discountstart = #{record.discountstart,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discountrate = #{record.discountrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
adjustedamount = #{record.adjustedamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
adjustnotes = #{record.adjustnotes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
currencytype = #{record.currencytype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
currencyrate = #{record.currencyrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
totalbillingamount = #{record.totalbillingamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
invoiceamount = #{record.invoiceamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
invoicestatus = #{record.invoicestatus,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
createbranchid = #{record.createbranchid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
settlementbranchid = #{record.settlementbranchid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
tariffid = #{record.tariffid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
taxrate = #{record.taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
paymentmethod = #{record.paymentmethod,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
notes = #{record.notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
udf01 = #{record.udf01,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
udf02 = #{record.udf02,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
udf03 = #{record.udf03,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
udf04 = #{record.udf04,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
udf05 = #{record.udf05,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
currentversion = #{record.currentversion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
oprseqflag = #{record.oprseqflag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
addwho = #{record.addwho,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
addtime = #{record.addtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
editwho = #{record.editwho,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
edittime = #{record.edittime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
edisendflag = #{record.edisendflag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
edierrordescr = #{record.edierrordescr,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ediSendTime = #{record.edisendtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
notetext = #{record.notetext,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
